They are now basically reversing themselves on that message by saying that they're going to be supporting multiple platforms.
That puts us in an awkward position simply because before we could compete with them by saying, hey, yes, those are good solutions, but we are a cross-platform solution.
Now, these products that we had this advantage over, theoretically, we no longer have because there's no longer an argument that's like, well, I would love to buy kanji, but...
I have a hundred Windows computers to manage because now you can totally do that.
So I think making the distinction between Apple and everything else is the wrong thing for us to do at this time.
